channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Free People Just Dropped Tons of Dress Deals Up to 74% Off
item.description: This is arguably the most difficult time of year for styling. We're starting to emerge from the frigid grasp of winter, but it's not quite spring. One...

item.title: Jennifer Garner Says Her, Ben Affleck’s Kids Think She’s “Cringe”
item.description: Jennifer Garner is embracing this non-elektrafying title from her kids. Indeed, the Alias alum admitted Violet, 20, Seraphina, 17, and Samuel, 13—whom...

item.title: Why Jelly Roll Didn’t Want to Read Wife Bunnie Xo’s Memoir
item.description: Jelly Roll wanted Bunnie Xo’s memoir to be entirely her own. And that’s why the “Wild Ones” singer was hesitant to even glance at a page of her book S...

item.title: Virginia Giuffre's Family Reacts to Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor Arrest

item.title: Jaguar Driver Crashes Into School Bus on Video, Later Arrested for DV at Home
item.description: An out-of-control driver slammed into the back of a school bus on a Florida street, shearing off his roof, somehow survived ... and later got arrested...

item.title: Queen Camilla Ignores Questions at Royal Outing About Ex-Prince Andrew's Arrest
item.description: Queen Camilla didn't waste time shedding any tears over former Prince Andrew on Thursday ... she was snapped carrying on with royal affairs just hours...

item.title: Rashee Rice Ex Dacoda Jones Posts Heartfelt Message To Son After Accusing NFL Star Of Abuse

item.title: 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' Star James Marsters Finalizes Divorce

item.title: LaMelo Ball Spotted Dipping Into Lamborghini After Car Crash In Charlotte

item.title: Sylvester Stallone's Best Acting Isn't In Rocky But Is In This '80s Action Movie
Billy Bob Thornton's Villain Stole This Infamous 1990s Action Movie With Only 3 Minutes Of Screentime
An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor
